name: A2 · Donation receipt + first-gift welcome (Supabase trigger → email)
_doc: Importable scaffold. Fires when a new donation lands (Supabase insert webhook, or chained from A1). Sends a branded receipt; if it's the donor's first gift, starts the 3-email welcome series (use a Wait node between sends or schedule). Templates: ../../fundraising/email-templates.md.

parameters.subject: Thank you — your gift is on its way to Kenya
parameters._note: Body = receipt template #1 from email-templates.md, merge {amount},{external_id}. To = donor email.
Welcome series emails 1-3 (template #2). Use Wait nodes (+1d, +4d, +10d) or enqueue scheduled sends. Keep each as its own emailSend node after a Wait.
parameters.subject: Welcome to Nisria
